$comment: A sheet: the desired orchestra (Sections > Desks > Stands), where each stand references an authorized WASM by `wasm_key`. Sheets hold no template definitions (see seed/templates.json). Deploying a sheet is idempotent: missing sections/desks/stands are created (reusing pooled canisters), stands no longer listed are retired back to the pool. Mirror of src/default_sheet.py.
name: demo
description: Default Casals demo orchestra: a Demo section with one desk per language (Motoko, Rust, Python), each running a backend stand plus a certified-assets frontend stand.

sections.name: Demo
sections.description: Neutral demo section: one full-stack desk per supported backend language.

desks.name: Motoko
desks.description: Motoko hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.

desks.name: Rust
desks.description: Rust hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.

desks.name: Python
desks.description: Basilisk (Python) hello-world backend + a certified-assets frontend.
